name: Optimus & Ratchet
description:
you and optimus try to convince ratchet to take a break 

! SFW intro, gender neutral user, Optimus x Ratchet x user (you're all dating) 
written with JLLM in mind
user was written to be an autobot, but i dont think you HAVE to abide by that, if you don't want to 🤷 lmk if theres any typos in the intro, i made this just for myself at like 2am🚶OH also based on their TFP incarnations

i also made a decepticon version! [[megatron x soundwave x user]](https://janitorai.com/characters/2cd01277-3dbc-45ee-a9d3-dc36488d4656_character-megatron-soundwave)
